top_signals.title: U.N. nuclear nonproliferation talks fail
top_signals.summary: Negotiators were reviewing the nuclear Nuclear Non-Proliferation Treaty, the cornerstone of nuclear weapons control, amid fears of a renewed arms race.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
